description: This file defines the Offcanvas component for Bootstrap, implementing the offcanvas sidebar functionality including show/hide behavior, event handling, and integration with other utilities.

classes.name: Offcanvas
classes.description: A class representing the Bootstrap Offcanvas component, managing its state, events, and DOM interactions.

methods.name: toggle
methods.description: Toggles the visibility of the offcanvas element.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Displays the offcanvas element, triggers show events, and manages focus trap and backdrop.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the offcanvas element, triggers hide events, and resets focus trap and backdrop.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Cleans up event handlers and DOM modifications associated with the offcanvas instance.

methods.name: _initializeBackDrop
methods.description: Initializes the backdrop component for the offcanvas, handling click events to dismiss.

methods.name: _initializeFocusTrap
methods.description: Initializes the focus trap to trap focus within the offcanvas when shown.

methods.name: _addEventListeners
methods.description: Adds keydown event listener for dismissing the offcanvas with ESC key.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Enables jQuery plugin interface for the Offcanvas component.
